basic_details.job_title: NABCONS Junior Level Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NABARD Consultancy Services (NABCONS) has published the Junior Level Consultant Recruitment 2026 Notification under Advt. No. NABCONS/CO-HR/09/PBCS/2026-27. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Junior Level Consultant position on a contract basis. Candidates aged between 24 and 50 years and holding a Graduate degree are eligible to apply online through the official NABCONS website. The application process is currently active and will remain open until 10 June 2026. Interested candidates can check the detailed notification, eligibility criteria, and online application link below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 24 years Maximum Age: 50 years

qualification.details: Junior Level Consultant: Graduate from any Recognized University in Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry, Agricultural Engineering, Dairy Technology, Veterinary and Animal Science only. Experience: 1-2 years' experience in Natural Resource Management/Financing/Value Chain Management/Agri. Marketing Based Projects/ Studies.

salary_details.details: Rs. 40,000/- per month with 5% annual revision.

selection_process: Interview Assessment for proficiency in MS Office/ data management
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NABCONS Junior Level Consultant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NABCONS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NABCONS Junior Level Consultant position?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of online applications is 10 June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for the Junior Level Consultant position is 24 years, and the maximum age limit is 50 years.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Level Consultant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a Graduate from any Recognized University in Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry, Agricultural Engineering, Dairy Technology, Veterinary and Animal Science.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Level Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 40,000/- per month, with a 5% annual revision.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Level Consultant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Level Consultant post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is strictly online. Candidates need to fill out the application form through the provided link on the official website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the experience required for the Junior Level Consultant position?
faq.answer: Candidates should have 1-2 years of experience in Natural Resource Management/Financing/Value Chain Management/Agri. Marketing Based Projects/Studies.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection criteria for the Junior Level Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and an Assessment for proficiency in MS Office/data management.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article for your convenience.
